Send us your ideas

February 1996
Journalism & Newsroom

The IRE/NICAR National Conference is scheduled for June 13-16 in Providence, with organizers seeking panel and speaker suggestions from members across all journalism sectors. Additional conference details, pricing, and Providence area information are available on the Providence Journal's conference website.

Planning is underway for the June 13-16 IRE/NICAR National Conference in Providence. We are intent on making this a program appealing to all our members - broadcast, print, freelance, big and small markets, alternatives, etc. Send suggestions for panels and speakers now to Rosemary Armao, IRE executive director, at jourrca@mizzoul.missouri.edu, or call her at (573) 882 1982. Meanwhile, check out the Providence Journal's National Conference Homepage at: http://www.projo.com/ire/.

You'll find dates, prices, hotel numbers, information on the shape of the program so far and fun things to do in New England.
